rag_rules: Place component type contracts in component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Use visible identifiers and named constants in type scope assumptions and guarantees
generic_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be syntactically valid and use visible symbols
Guarantees should relate visible outputs to visible inputs in component type contracts
Constants and equations in AGREE must use valid scalar types: int, real, bool
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use `assume "label": expression;` and `guarantee "label": expression;` for contracts
anti_patterns: Do not reference implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit typed ports
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing properties
Implementation-level bindings and subcomponent port usage
